subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, through Whose grace the gates of mercy, bounty and protection have been opened wide, and His loved ones, through His blessed Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایتش ابواب رحمت و عنایت و حفظ گشاده و مفتوح اولیائش بکلمه مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the power of words; of speech, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement
